calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition (To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN DAHLBERG OF DILLINGHAM MURPHY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 357-2700 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER LF VENTURES, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. (Principal - $1,011,602.77) Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913
